steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: In the phrase "a writing technique that ______ emphasis," the subject of the relative clause is "that," referring to the singular noun "technique." The verb must agree with that singular subject.

steps.title: Apply agreement
steps.content: A is a plural verb form. B is also plural and unnecessarily progressive. C uses "have," which does not agree with a singular subject. The answer is D.
